title: Homeowners Premium Tax Reduction Act of 2025
short_title: Homeowners Premium Tax Reduction Act of 2025
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
crs_summary: Homeowners Premium Tax Reduction Act of 2025  This bill establishes a new deduction of up to $10,000 claimed against gross income (above-the-line tax deduction) for annual policy premiums paid or incurred for homeowners insurance on an individual's principal residence.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
